# ARC-20 | Bitcoin Universe Protocol Reference

> Human docs: index.html
> Field reference: reference.html
> Network: Bitcoin
> Classification: Atomicals colored-satoshi fungibles

## Summary

A fungible token standard in the Atomicals ecosystem where units are represented by satoshis and follow Bitcoin's UTXO model.

## State model

Atomicals digital-object history plus satoshi-backed colored coin behavior for direct or decentralized minting.

## Lifecycle

1. Register ticker
2. Direct or dmint
3. Colored UTXO
4. Split or combine

## Operations

- Direct mint: Creates the full supply in a creator-controlled mint flow.
- Decentralized mint: Opens a rules-based mint campaign for participants.
- Transfer: Moves the UTXO-backed units with normal Bitcoin transaction construction.
- Verify: Replays Atomical history and UTXO ownership to verify the object.

## Safety

1. ARC-20 handling depends on precise UTXO selection. Use a wallet that understands Atomicals assets.
2. Do not infer token ownership from a ticker alone. Verify the Atomical history and the active UTXO.
3. Atomicals are a separate protocol family from Ordinals. Tooling that is safe for one may not correctly preserve the other.

## Sources

- Atomicals ARC-20 guide: https://atomicals-community.github.io/atomicals-guide/arc20-tokens/
- Atomicals developer guide: https://github.com/atomicals-community/atomicals-guide
